announcement.body: We are a community of Sudanese professionals committed to knowledge sharing, peer development, and supporting each other's growth. Browse the upcoming sessions below or explore our specialised communities.

about.title: About the Club
about.subtitle: Sudanese Professionals Club (SPC) is a platform gathering expertise to build a bright future through knowledge sharing and innovation.
about.vision_body: To be the leading platform that unites and empowers Sudanese professionals to become pioneers in building a knowledge-based society and global innovation.
about.mission_body: Providing a supportive environment for exchanging expertise, developing skills, and fostering professional collaboration that contributes to creating a positive and sustainable impact.
about.advisory_desc: Senior advisors guiding the strategic direction and partnership opportunities for the club.
about.executive_desc: Executive team managing the day-to-day operations, committees, and events.
about.org_subtitle: SPC relies on a flexible organizational structure that ensures efficient performance and rapid response to the needs of its members and communities.
about.org_chart_alt: Organizational structure diagram mapping out General Assembly, Advisory Board, Executive Office, and Specialized Committees.

roles.ahmed_desc: Over 12 years of experience in career development and administrative coaching.
roles.mona_body: Passionate about improving healthcare quality and neonatal care.
roles.sami_body: PfMP, PgMP, PMP certified, leading strategic training programs.
roles.akoud_title: Tech Product Manager | President of Executive Office
roles.akoud_body: Specialized in AI and Data Science. MS in Software Engineering.
roles.sara_body: Nets/cybersecurity engineer, designing secure digital infrastructures.
roles.abuyazid_title: Software Engineer | Head of Tech Committee
roles.abuyazid_body: Focusing on web applications, cloud architecture, and applied AI.

about.vision_desc: To be the leading platform that unites and empowers Sudanese professionals to become pioneers in building a global knowledge and innovation society.
